title: KubeJS EnderIO
body:
This mod adds KubeJS integration to EnderIO.

Current features:
- full support and builders for all recipe types
- custom bindings to generate chanced and ranged outputs for special recipe types
- the ability to filter inherited vanilla smelting recipes from the Alloy Smelter
- events:
  - register custom capacitors
  - register custom conduits
  - add new grinding balls
  - add/remove/modify vat reagents

![](https://i.imgur.com/Rmi0oMb.png)

An in-depth explanation of the syntax can be found on the [wiki](https://docs.almostreliable.com/kubejs-enderio/).
